name: Standing Hip Abduction
description: Strengthens hip abductors for gait stability and fall prevention.
instructions: 1. Stand behind a chair for support. 2. Lift one leg out to the side 30-45 degrees keeping trunk upright. 3. Slowly lower. Repeat.
commonMistakes: Leaning trunk sideways instead of keeping it upright; using momentum; lifting leg too high.
cuesThumbnail: Keep trunk upright. Slow controlled return takes 3 seconds.
